home.a: Streamline is a modern financial dashboard that aggregates all your bank accounts, subsidiaries, and currencies into one unified, real-time view—complete with analytics, alerts, and custom reporting.

home.q: How is Streamline different from Linear and Jira?
home.a: Unlike Linear and Jira, which focus on issue tracking and project management, Streamline is built specifically for financial operations—bringing real-time banking data, cash-flow insights, and compliance tools into a single platform.

home.q: How do I update my account?
home.a: Head over to your Account Settings → Profile, where you can update your email, password, notification preferences, and connected institutions at any time.

home.q: Is support free, or do I need to Google everything?
home.a: All users receive complimentary email support and access to our knowledge base. Professional and Enterprise plans include 24/7 live chat and phone support.

home.q: Are you going to be subsumed by AI?
home.a: We leverage AI for smart alerts and insights, but rest assured, Streamline remains a human-driven platform—no plan to replace your finance team with a chatbot!

home.q: How do I connect my bank accounts and subsidiaries?
home.a: Simply navigate to the Integrations tab, select your bank or financial institution, and authorize access with your online banking credentials. Once connected, all accounts under that legal entity—subsidiaries and branches included—will automatically appear in your dashboard.

home.q: Which banks and financial institutions are supported?
home.a: We support thousands of institutions worldwide—including major banks like JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, HSBC, Barclays, Deutsche Bank, and hundreds more. Visit the Integrations page in-app for the full list.

faq.a: FeaturesStreamline is built on the habits that make the best product teams successful

faq.q: How do I contact customer support?
faq.a: Open the in-app chat (bottom-right), email support@aspect.finance, or call +1-628-246-3000. We reply within one business hour on paid plans.

faq.q: Where can I find product documentation?
faq.a: All docs live at **docs.aspect.finance**. You can also press **⌘ / Ctrl + K** in the app to search without leaving your dashboard.

faq.q: Can I request a live demo or training session?
faq.a: Absolutely—book a 30-minute Zoom session from **aspect.finance/demo**. Training is free for teams of up to ten users.
Live chat and phone: Monday–Friday 08:00–20:00 UTC. Email tickets are monitored 24 / 7.

faq.q: How can I report a bug or submit feedback?
faq.a: Hit the **“Feedback”** button in the sidebar or email us. Every submission is reviewed by the product team within 48 hours.

faq.q: How do I sign up for Aspect?
faq.a: Click “Get Started” on our homepage, choose a plan, and follow the on-screen steps. The whole process takes under two minutes and requires only your work email.

faq.q: Which banks and financial institutions are supported?
faq.a: Aspect connects to 12,000+ banks and fintech platforms across North America and Europe via Plaid and Salt Edge. If yours isn’t listed, let us know and we’ll add it.

faq.q: How do I add or remove users from my organization?
faq.a: In **Settings ▸ Team** click “Invite” to add a colleague, or the trash-can icon to revoke access. Only users with the Admin role can manage seats.

faq.q: Which banks and platforms can I connect?
faq.a: Any institution supported by Plaid, Salt Edge, or Open Banking. That includes most major retail and business banks, plus Stripe, PayPal, and Wise.
Yes—drag & drop widgets, create custom KPIs, and save multiple layouts for different roles.
Set the source, destination, amount, and schedule. Aspect will initiate the transfer automatically and notify you on success or failure.

faq.q: Can I set up custom alerts and notifications?
faq.a: Go to **Settings ▸ Alerts** and define thresholds (balance, incoming amount, etc.). Choose email, SMS, Slack, or push notifications.
All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Our infrastructure runs in ISO 27001-certified data centers.
Yes—TOTP, WebAuthn security keys, and Okta SSO are available on every plan, including Free.

faq.q: Are my banking credentials stored on Aspect servers?
faq.a: No. OAuth tokens are stored with our banking aggregator and are never exposed to our network or databases.
Aspect offers a free Starter plan, a Team plan at $25/user/mo, and an Enterprise plan with volume discounts. See aspect.finance/pricing.
Yes—the Aspect REST & Webhook API is included in the Team plan and above. API keys can be generated in **Settings ▸ Developers**.

faq.q: Can I export my data if I decide to cancel?
faq.a: Of course. Export to CSV, JSON, or directly to S3. Your data is retained for 30 days post-cancellation, then permanently deleted.
